---
title: "Termination"
description: "Stopping policies for memory search"
---

Termination policies determine when a model stops retrieving items.

## The TerminationPolicy Protocol

```python
class TerminationPolicy(Protocol):
    def stop_probability(self, model: "MemorySearch") -> Float[Array, ""]:
        """Returns stop probability for the provided model."""
        ...
```

## Available Implementations

*Coming soon: documentation of termination policy variants*
